docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-12-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-15-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-17-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,127.17 FILED BY KING, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT SERTORIO, NICOLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANT. RESET TRIAL DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING, PETER
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SERTORIO, NICOLO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KING, PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SERTORIO, NICOLO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65.00) SERVED OCT-01-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SERTORIO, NICOLO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERTORIO, NICOLO $810.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $885.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $5400.00 FOR THE VALUE OF THE VEHICLE, PLUS REASONABLE LOSS OF USE. THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 85% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SERTORIO, NICOLO RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT KING, PETER $425.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $425.00, DEFENDANT'S DAMAGES WERE DETERMINED TO BE $500.00, AND THE COURT ATTRIBUTED 15% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
